name: Audit Log Retention 1 Year
description: Ensures audit trail history is retained for at least one year with 3 months immediately available (PCI DSS 10.7)
query: SELECT id, log_type, retention_days, immediate_availability_days FROM log_retention_policies WHERE cde_scope = true AND (retention_days < 365 OR immediate_availability_days < 90)
remediation: Configure audit log retention for minimum 1 year with at least 3 months immediately available for analysis.
